strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js production experience, including React, at multiple Berlin-based product companies
Direct exposure to nice-to-have areas: AI-agent infrastructure/MCP tooling, Kubernetes deployments, and AWS (CDK)
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing culture) aligning with the clean-architecture interest
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch: a Staff/Senior engineer with ~18 years of experience applying to an entry-level role poses high flight and compensation risk
Location conflict: based in Lagos, Nigeria while the role requires high on-site presence, with only basic German
No stated PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience — database background centers on MongoDB and MySQL, and significant career investment is in the niche DLang ecosystem
response.justification: While the candidate is technically accomplished, he is a poor fit for this specific opening. The role is explicitly entry-level with high on-site presence, yet the candidate is a Staff-level engineer with nearly two decades of experience currently located in Lagos, Nigeria — a combination that raises serious questions about salary alignment, long-term retention, and physical availability. His stack overlaps only partially with the requirements: PostgreSQL and Nest.js are absent from the resume, and much of his deepest expertise (DLang, low-latency systems) is irrelevant to a junior fullstack platform role. The mismatch between candidate profile and role scope argues against advancing him for this position.
